summary: Completed testing for two features: 1) News detail page header transparency bug fix - PASSED, 2) CMS admin-only Activity Log feature - PASSED. All backend API tests (9/9) and frontend UI tests pass.
passed_tests: P0: News detail page header is transparent (bg-transparent) at top of page (scrollY=0)
P0: News detail page header becomes solid white (bg-white/95) after scrolling past 20px
P1: GET /api/logs returns log entries for admin user - status 200
P1: GET /api/logs/count returns log count - status 200
P1: GET /api/logs?category=auth correctly filters logs by category
P1: Non-admin users receive 403 Forbidden when accessing /api/logs
P1: Non-admin users receive 403 Forbidden when accessing /api/logs/count
P1: Login action creates a log entry in the database with correct user_email and action
P1: Admin sidebar shows 'Activity Log' link only for admin users (not visible for editor role)
P1: Activity Log admin page renders with: search input, category filter, refresh button, and table
P1: Activity Log page shows login events with correct user email and timestamp
seed_data_creation: Created test editor user (TEST_editor_logs@gys.co.id) for testing non-admin access
context_for_next_testing_agent: Activity Log feature is fully functional. Header transparency fix works correctly on NewsDetailPage. Test credentials: admin@gys.co.id/admin123 (admin), testuser@gys.co.id/test123 (editor). Backend logs API tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_logs_api.py
